Our Story · 本店故事

五十年風味
三代傳承

Three Generations, One Flavour
```

裕和合記由東莞人方蔭芬於一九七三年在西營盤創立，逾五十年屹立香江。祖傳秘方以精選豬肉配玫瑰露酒、醬油及天然香料調製，人手切肉、灌腸、綁水草，入爐焙烤整整四天，方成一條香氣四溢的臘腸。

Founded in 1973 in Sai Ying Pun by Fong Yam-fan from Dongguan, Yu Wo Hop Kee has stood firm for over fifty years. Our heirloom recipe blends premium pork with rose wine, aged soy, and natural spices — hand-stuffed, hand-tied, and kiln-dried for four full days.

早期由方氏家族打理，後由女婿傅秋榮接手主理。近年第三代傅志聰（Sam）放下銀行工作，毅然回歸家業，以社交媒體推廣老店，延續這門香港手藝。

Now in its third generation, Sam Fu left a career in banking to carry on the family trade — blending old-world craft with modern outreach to keep this Hong Kong tradition alive.

50+
```

Signature Products · 招牌精品

本店臘味精選

Our Finest Preserved Meats
```
招牌 · Signature
五花臘肉
Cured Pork Belly (Wu Fa)
精選五花豬腩肉，以秘製醬油、砂糖及玫瑰露酒醃製風乾，肥瘦層次分明，香濃入味，煲仔飯首選。
Layered pork belly cured with heirloom soy, sugar & rose wine — rich, aromatic, perfect for clay pot rice.
HK$148 / 斤
人氣 · Popular
```
煎金蠔臘腸皇
Pan-Fried Gold Oyster Sausage
以鮮豬肉加入優質蠔油調製，腸身飽滿，外皮金黃香脆，甘香鮮美，煎熟後香氣四溢。
Plump sausage with premium oyster sauce — golden, crisp when pan-fried, bursting with savoury fragrance.
HK$198 / 斤
```
精選 · Premium
```
乾鴨潤腸
Dried Duck Liver Sausage
選用優質鴨潤（鴨肝），乾製後質地結實爽口，味道濃郁深邃，搭配白飯或粥品皆宜。
Firm-dried duck liver sausage with deep, rich flavour — excellent with plain rice or congee.
HK$168 / 斤
```
傳統 · Classic
```
南安臘鴨髀
Nam On Preserved Duck Leg
採用南安傳統工法製作，鴨髀肉質緊緻，皮薄油潤，鹹香恰到好處，蒸熟後香氣撲鼻。
Nam On-style preserved duck leg — firm flesh, glossy skin, perfectly savoury when steamed.
HK$138 / 隻
```
特色 · Specialty
```
鮮特瘦臘腸皇
Extra-Lean Fresh Pork Sausage
精選特瘦豬肉製作，脂肪含量低，肉香純正，口感爽彈，適合追求健康又不想放棄臘味風味的顧客。
Made from extra-lean pork — low fat, pure meaty flavour with a satisfying bite. A healthier indulgence.
HK$128 / 斤
```
人氣 · Popular
```
鮮鵝潤腸
Fresh Goose Liver Sausage
以新鮮鵝肝為主料，配以玫瑰露酒及秘製香料，膶香濃郁，油脂豐盈，入口即化，為膶腸之極品。
Premium fresh goose liver with rose wine & secret spices — rich, unctuous and utterly indulgent.
HK$228 / 斤

Online Shopping · 網上購物

Order with Ease · Delivered to Your Door
```

裕和合記現透過 Mshop 平台提供網上購物服務，全線臘味產品均可網購，方便全港顧客。支援多種付款方式，配合順豐、嘉里等主要速遞服務，全港1-3個工作天送達。

Yu Wo Hop Kee now offers online shopping via the Mshop platform. Order our full range of preserved meats with multiple payment options and major courier services across Hong Kong.
```
